## Type of PR

- [ ] Data-Generation
- [ ] Front-end
- [ ] Back-end

## Summary

- What was generated? (users, tasks, impacts, etc.)
- What was changed? (UI, API, database schema, etc.)
- Which script/file/module was updated? `.../.../...`

## Author

- Name: `...`

---

## Testing

- [ ] Faker script runs without errors
- [ ] Data respects database constraints
- [ ] No duplicate emails / invalid data
- [ ] Frontend builds/runs correctly
- [ ] API endpoints tested

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Code is clean and readable
- [ ] No unnecessary files committed
- [ ] Follows project structure
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed

---

## Notes

- Any assumptions made
- Any limitations in generated data
- Future improvements
